text.title: Personas Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end example applying Personas to a concrete case.

section.title: Dashboard product personas

example.code:
Interview count: 8.
## Sarah, The Busy Manager (primary) - Goals: quick insights, report to leadership with confidence - Frustrations: too many clicks, no recommendation context - Behaviours: checks dashboards on mobile between meetings - Context: early morning, between meetings, mobile-first - Scenario: Monday 9am, 10 min before leadership meeting, opens app, sees key metric summary, identifies underperforming campaign - JTBD: hires the dashboard to look prepared in meetings - Quote: 'I don't have time to dig through dashboards. Just tell me what I need to know.' — P4 (Interview #4, April 2026) - Date-stamped: 2026-05-20

section.note: Every required field populated with verbatim-quote + participant ID; JTBD operationalises the persona.
